content.rendered:
Roof Repairs and Restoration Specialists in Sunshine

Seven Roofing is a reliable roofing contractor, providing roof repairs and roof restoration services to clients in Sunshine and in the nearby areas. Specialising in tile and metal roofing systems, our team has had the privilege of working with countless roofing projects across Melbourne. 

Using the best Australian products in the market along with the latest roofing equipment in the industry, we can provide quality roofing services to all our clients. 

Here’s what we can help you with: 

  • General Roof Repairs
  • Roof Leak Repair
  • Roof Replacement
  • Roof Restoration
  • Gutter Replacement 

From minor roofing repairs to entire roof replacements, Seven Roofing is equipped with the expertise and technology to tackle any job with a high level of care and attention to detail. Whether it’s a residential home or a commercial property, we can improve various aspects of your roof including its functionality, longevity and aesthetic appeal.

If you need assistance, our team can provide professional advice regarding your roofing needs. 

Get in touch with us today and we can discuss your requirements. Once we have an understanding of your needs, we’ll provide you with a custom solution that is personalised to your exact needs. Contact Seven Roofing today by calling 0404 402 145 or by emailing info@sevenroofing.com.au.
